name: Google Workspace CLI
description: Official Google CLI giving AI agents unified access to Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Chat, and Admin — with built-in AI agent skill integration.

skills.name: Drive Operations
skills.description: List, upload, download, and manage files in Google Drive from an AI agent via CLI commands

skills.name: Gmail Operations
skills.description: Send, read, search, and manage Gmail messages and labels programmatically from agent workflows

skills.name: Calendar Operations
skills.description: Create, read, update, and delete Google Calendar events from AI agents via the Workspace CLI

skills.name: Sheets Operations
skills.description: Read and write Google Sheets data, manage formulas, and batch update cells from agent scripts
